Samuel Eto'o. Barcelona (2009). Inter Milan (2010).

Goalscorer, workhorse, legend. His European peak wasn't just good, it was unprecedented. Argue with history, not me.

Think modern players are unique? You're missing a legend!

George Weah's 1995 Ballon d'Or wasn't just a win; it was a statement.

His raw power, blistering pace, and incredible skill made him unstoppable for PSG and AC Milan. The ONLY African player to ever lift it, he changed perceptions forever. What a player!
